pages.image_tooltip: An abelisaur with a short, deep skull and massive pair of horns, Carnotaurus furiously charges at anything it sets its sights on in a blind, rage-fuelled stampede.

pages.feature_1.title: Furious
pages.feature_1.tooltip: Carnotaurus charges at anything it attacks, ramming them with its horns
pages.feature_2.title: Bodyguard!
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Carnotaurus will attack any monsters it sees on sight
pages.feature_3.title: Born Warrior
pages.feature_3.tooltip: Baby Carnotaurus are just as aggressive as their adult counterparts
